examples.eng: The island's population irrupted.
There are only a few cars on the island.
examples.ru: На острове всего лишь несколько машин.

examples.eng: The island possesses great charm.
The island's birds are quite tame.
examples.ru: Птицы на этом острове совсем ручные.

examples.eng: The island is pestered with adders.
They circled the island seven times.
examples.ru: Они семь раз обошли вокруг острова.

examples.eng: the northeasterly part of the island
We'll make a trip by launch to White Island.
examples.ru: Мы поедем на катере на остров Уайт.

examples.eng: The best way to explore the island is to hire a car.
examples.ru: Лучший способ исследовать остров — взять напрокат машину.

examples.eng: The Cayman Islands
We boated over to the island.
examples.ru: Мы переправились на остров в лодке.

the eastern end of the island
the leeward side of the island
The island is rich in bird life.
We sailed to an offshore island.
The island profits from tourism.
A tempest swept over the island.
the ambience of a tropical island
on the leeward side of the island
Tourism on the island has boomed.
the westernmost tip of the island
an island renowned for its beauty
the northernmost tip of the island

Tourism on the island is oversold.
examples.ru: С точки зрения туризма, остров чересчур перехваливают.

examples.eng: an island peopled by hardy seafolk
They ferry supplies to the island.
The 's' in 'island' is not sounded.
an island in the embrace of the sea
